commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=383166b4a3115520575d8d1cce2371666a0843b7)
commands.review_summary:
The PR expands workspace skill loading and watcher invalidation to bounded nested `SKILL.md` discovery, including repo-style `skills/` companion folders, symlink handling, and regression tests.

PR surface: Source +512, Tests +831. Total +1343 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main only scans direct skill folders and one grouped level, so a deeper `skills/a/b/c/SKILL.md` path is ignored. I did not run a live runtime repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs contributor-provided real behavior proof plus maintainer acceptance of the protected-label compatibility change; automation cannot supply the contributor setup proof.

target.title: fix: support nested skill discovery
target.body:
## Summary
- Support bounded nested `SKILL.md` discovery under grouped skill folders.
- Handle repo-style configured roots with `skills/` companion folders, direct skills, invalid root/frontmatter cases, symlinks, and source caps.
- Update skill watchers to cover the new nested depth, absent roots, trusted symlink targets, and bounded symlink scans without following arbitrary symlinks.

## Verification
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --write --threads=1 src/agents/skills/workspace.ts src/agents/skills/refresh.ts src/agents/skills/refresh.test.ts src/agents/skills.loadworkspaceskillentries.test.ts && pnpm test src/agents/skills.loadworkspaceskillentries.test.ts src/agents/skills/refresh.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose` — 62 tests passed.
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` — clean, no accepted/actionable findings.
- `git diff --check` — passed.
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src/agents/skills/workspace.ts src/agents/skills/refresh.ts src/agents/skills/refresh.test.ts src/agents/skills.loadworkspaceskillentries.test.ts` — passed.
- `env -u OPENCLAW_TESTBOX pnpm check:changed` — core and core-test typechecks passed; failed in `lint core` because `tsgolint` segfaulted without reporting a source diagnostic.
- `pnpm check:changed` via Testbox `tbx_01ksqp463dbh601jx41nqqzc3s` — blocked before checks by remote checkout error: `origin/main...HEAD: no merge base`.
target.author: steipete

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
